title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Get 40% Bonus GTA$ on Qualifying Shark Cards
content:
Sign in to your linked account in-game or online and purchase up to five of each of the Megalodon, Whale, or Great White Shark Cards before August 6, 2026, to receive 40% bonus GTA$. GTA+ Members get an additional 15% bonus.

Must claim this offer by July 22 at 11:59 PM ET and complete purchase of qualifying Shark Cards by August 5 at 11:59 PM ET to receive bonus. Limited to five redemptions per Shark Card type per Rockstar Games account.
